name: chzzkpy

metadata.name: chzzkpy
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: An unofficial Python library of Chzzk(Naver live-streaming service)

documentation:
# chzzkpy ![PyPI - Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/chzzkpy?style=flat) ![PyPI - Downloads](https://img.shields.io/pypi/dm/chzzkpy?style=flat) ![PyPI - License](https://img.shields.io/pypi/l/chzzkpy?style=flat) 파이썬 기반의 치지직(네이버 라이브 스트리밍 서비스)의 비공식 라이브러리 입니다.
An unofficial python library for [Chzzk(Naver Live Streaming Service)](https://chzzk.naver.com/).
* [공식 문서(한국어)](https://gunyu1019.github.io/chzzkpy/ko/) * [Offical Documentation(English)](https://gunyu1019.github.io/chzzkpy/en/) #### Available Features * 채팅 * 사용자 상호 채팅 * 사용자 후원 * 메시지 상단 고정하기 * 시스템 메시지 * 메시지 관리 * 채널 관리 * 금칙어 설정 * 활동 제한 * 채널 규칙 설정 * 영상/팔로워/구독자 관리 * 로그인 (쿠키 값 `NID_AUT`, `NID_SES` 사용) * 검색 (채널, 영상, 라이브, 자동완성) * 방송 상태 조회 ## Installation **Python 3.10 or higher is required.** ```bash # Linux/MacOS python3 -m pip install chzzkpy # Windows py -3 -m pip install chzzkpy ``` To install the development version. ```bash $ git clone https://github.com/gunyu1019/chzzk_py $ chzzk_py $ python3 -m pip install -U . ``` ## Quick Example `chzzkpy`를 사용한 예제는 [Examples](examples)에서 확인하실 수 있습니다.
아래는 간단한 예제입니다. #### 방송인 검색 ```py import asyncio import chzzkpy async def main(): client = chzzkpy.Client() result = await client.search_channel("건유1019") if len(result) == 0: print("검색 결과가 없습니다 :(") await client.close() return print(result[0].name) print(result[0].id) print(result[0].image) await client.close() asyncio.run(main()) ``` #### 챗봇 (Chat-Bot) ```py from chzzkpy.chat import ChatClient, ChatMessage, DonationMessage client = ChatClient("channel_id") @client.event async def on_chat(message: ChatMessage): if message.content == "!안녕": await client.send_chat("%s님, 안녕하세요!" % message.profile.nickname) @client.event async def on_donation(message: DonationMessage): await client.send_chat("%s님, %d원 후원 감사합니다." % (message.profile.nickname, message.extras.pay_amount)) # 챗봇 기능을 이용하기 위해서는 네이버 사용자 인증이 필요합니다. # 웹브라우저의 쿠키 값에 있는 NID_AUT와 NID_SES 값으로 로그인을 대체할 수 있습니다. client.run("NID_AUT", "NID_SES") ``` #### 팔로워 불러오기 (Get followers) ```py import asyncio import chzzkpy async def main(): client = chzzkpy.Client() # 채널 관리 기능을 이용하기 위해서는 네이버 사용자 인증이 필요합니다. # 웹브라우저의 쿠키 값에 있는 NID_AUT와 NID_SES 값으로 로그인을 대체할 수 있습니다. client.login("NID_AUT", "NID_SES") manage_client = client.manage("channel_id") followers = await manage_client.followers() if len(result) == 0: print("팔로워가 없습니다. :(") await client.close() return for user in result.data: print(f"{user.user.nickname}: {user.following.follow_date}부터 팔로우 중.") await client.close() asyncio.run(main()) ``` ## Contributions `chzzkpy`의 기여는 언제든지 환영합니다!
버그 또는 새로운 기능은 `Pull Request`로 진행해주세요.

methods.name: chzzkpy.user.PartialUser.add_restrict
documentation: Add this user to restrict activity.

methods.name: chzzkpy.user.PartialUser.remove_restrict
documentation: Remove this user to restrict activity.

methods.name: chzzkpy.user.PartialUser.add_role
documentation:
Add a broadcast permission to this user.

# Parameters

role

: A enumeration class containing broadcast role.
  It can only set the role to {attribute}`UserRole.chat_manager`,
  {attribute}`UserRole.settlement_manager`, or {attribute}`UserRole.broadcast_manager`.
  Giving any other role will cause a {exception}`TypeError` exception.

methods.name: chzzkpy.user.PartialUser.remove_role
documentation: Remove a broadcast permission to this user.

methods.name: chzzkpy.user.PartialUser.chat_activity_count
documentation:
Get chat activity count of this user.

Returns
-------
ChatActivityCount
    Returns a chat activity count object contains the count of temporary activity restrictions,
    the count of activity restrictions, and the count of chats.

classes.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.close
documentation: Closes the connection to chzzk.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.is_closed
documentation: Indicates if the session is closed.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.get_prohibit_words
documentation:
Get prohibit words in chat.

Returns
-------
List[ProhibitWord]
    Returns the prohibit words.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.get_prohbit_word
documentation:
Get prohibit word with word.
When word does not contain prohibit word, returns None.

# Parameters

word

: A word to find prohibit word.

# Returns

Optional[ProhibitWord]

: When word contains prohibit words, return {class}`ProhibitWord` object.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.add_prohibit_word
documentation:
Add a prohibit word at chat.

Parameters
----------
word : str
    A word to prohibit.

Returns
-------
Optional[ProhibitWord]
    Returns the generated prohibit word.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.edit_prohibit_word
documentation:
Modify a prohibit word.

Parameters
----------
prohibit_word : ProhibitWord | int
    The prohibit word object to modify.
    Instead, it can be prohibit word id.
word : str
    A new word to prohibit.

Returns
-------
Optional[ProhibitWord]
    Returns the modified prohibit word.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.remove_prohibit_word
documentation:
Remove a prohibit word.

Parameters
----------
prohibit_word : ProhibitWord | int
    The prohibit word object to remove.
    Instead, it can be prohibit word id.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.remove_prohibit_words
documentation: Remove all prohibit words.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.get_chat_rule
documentation:
Get chat rule of broadcast.

Returns
-------
str
    Returns a chat rule.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.set_chat_rule
documentation:
Set chat rule of broadcast.

Parameters
----------
word : str
    A new chat rule to set up.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.stream
documentation:
Get a stream key required for streamming.

Returns
-------
Stream
    Return a stream key for streamming.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.add_restrict
documentation:
Add an user to restrict activity.

Parameters
----------
user : str | ParticleUser
    A user object to add restrict activity.
    Instead, it can be user id or nickname.

Returns
-------
ParticleUser
    Returns an object containning activity-restricted users.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.remove_restrict
documentation:
Remove an user to restrict activity.

Parameters
----------
user : str | ParticleUser
    A user object to remove restrict activity.
    Instead, it can be user id or nickname.

Returns
-------
ParticleUser
    Returns an user whose activity is unrestricted.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.add_role
documentation:
Add a broadcast permission to user.

# Parameters

user

: A user object to add role.
  Instead, it can be user id or nickname.

role

: A enumeration class containing broadcast role.
  It can only set the role to {attribute}`UserRole.chat_manager`,
  {attribute}`UserRole.settlement_manager`, or {attribute}`UserRole.broadcast_manager`.
  Giving any other role will cause a {exception}`TypeError` exception.

# Returns

ParticleUser

: Returns an user with added role.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.remove_role
documentation:
Remove a broadcast permission to user.

Parameters
----------
user : str | ParticleUser
    A user object to remove role.
    Instead, it can be user id or nickname.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.chat_activity_count
documentation:
Get chat activity count of user.

Parameters
----------
user : str | ParticleUser
    A user object to get chat activity count.
    Instead, it can be user id.

Returns
-------
ChatActivityCount
    Returns a chat activity count object contains the count of temporary activity restrictions,
the count of activity restrictions, and the count of chats.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.subcribers
documentation:
Get subcribers of channel.

# Parameters

page

: The number of page, by default 0

size

: The number of subscribers to import at once, by default 50

sort_type

: A sort order, by default SortType.recent

publish_period

: Lookup by the subscriber's publish period, by default None

tier

: Lookup by the subscriber's tier, by default None.

nickname

: Lookup by the subscriber's nickname, by default None

# Returns

ManageResult[ManageSubcriber]

: Returns a {class}`ManageResult` containing the subscriber info.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.followers
documentation:
Get followers of channel.

# Parameters

page

: The number of page, by default 0

size

: The number of followers to import at once, by default 50

sort_type

: A sort order, by default SortType.recent

# Returns

ManageResult[ManageFollower]

: Returns a {class}`ManageResult` containing the follower info.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.restrict
documentation:
Get activitiy restricted user of channel.

# Parameters

page

: The number of page, by default 0

size

: The number of activity restricted user to import at once, by default 50

nickname

: Lookup by the activity restricted user's nickname, by default None

# Returns

ManageResult[RestrictUser]

: Returns a {class}`ManageResult` containing the restricted user info.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.unrestrict_requests
documentation:
Get unrestrict activity requests of channel.

# Parameters

page

: The number of page, by default 0

size

: The number of unrestrict activity requests to import at once, by default 50

nickname

: Lookup by the unrestrict activity requests with user's nickname, by default None

# Returns

ManageResult[UnrestrictRequest]

: Returns a {class}`ManageResult` containing the unrestrict requests.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.live_replay
documentation:
Get streamming replay video of channel.

# Parameters

page

: The number of page, by default 0

size

: The number of streamming replay video to import at once, by default 50

# Returns

ManageResult[ManageVideo]

: Returns a {class}`ManageResult` containing the streamming replay video.

methods.name: chzzkpy.manage.manage_client.ManageClient.videos
documentation:
Get uploaded video of channel.

# Parameters

page

: The number of page, by default 0

size

: The number of video to import at once, by default 50

# Returns

ManageResult[ManageVideo]

: Returns a {class}`ManageResult` containing the video.
Represent a client that provides broadcast management functionality.

classes.name: chzzkpy.client.Client

methods.name: chzzkpy.client.Client.is_closed
documentation: Indicates if the session is closed.

methods.name: chzzkpy.client.Client.close
documentation: Closes the connection to chzzk.

methods.name: chzzkpy.client.Client.login
documentation:
Login at Chzzk.
Used for features that require a login. (ex. user method)

Parameters
----------
authorization_key : str
    A `NID_AUT` value in the cookie.
session_key : str
    A `NID_SES` value in the cookie.

Get a live status info of broadcaster.

Parameters

Optional[LiveStatus]

Get my user info.
This method should be used after login.

Returns

User
    Information for logged-in user.

list[Channel]

methods.name: chzzkpy.client.Client.autocomplete

methods.name: chzzkpy.client.Client.manage
documentation:
Get a client provided broadcast management functionality.

# Parameters

channel_id

: A channel id to manage broadcasts.
  The default value is the last channel id used.
  If initally use the manage method and don't have a channel_id argument,
  it will raise a {exception}`TypeError` exception.

# Returns

ManageClient

: Return a client provided broadcast management functionality.
Represents a client to connect Chzzk (Naver Live Streaming).

classes.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.is_connected
documentation: Specifies if the client successfully connected with chzzk.

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.login
documentation:
Login at Chzzk.
Used for features that require a login. (ex. user method)

Parameters
----------
authorization_key : str
    A `NID_AUT` value in the cookie.
session_key : str
    A `NID_SES` value in the cookie.

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.close
documentation: Close the connection to chzzk.

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.wait_until_connected
documentation: Waits until the client's internal cache is all ready.
Event Handler

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.wait_for
documentation:
Waits for a WebSocket event to be dispatched.

# Parameters

event

: The event name.
  For a list of events, read {method}`event`

check

: A predicate to check what to wait for. The arguments must meet the
  parameters of the event being waited for.

timeout

: The number of seconds to wait before timing out and raising
  {exc}`asyncio.TimeoutError`.

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.event
documentation:
A decorator that registers an event to listen to.
The function must be corutine. Else client cause TypeError

A list of events that the client can listen to.
\* `on_chat`: Called when a ChatMessage is created and sent.
\* `on_connect`: Called when the client is done preparing the data received from Chzzk.
\* `on_donation`: Called when a listener donates
\* `on_system_message`: Called when a system message is created and sent.

> (Example. notice/blind message)

- `on_recent_chat`: Called when a recent chat received.
  : This event called when `request_recent_chat` method called.
- `on_pin` / `on_unpin`: Called when a message pinned or unpinned.
- `on_blind`: Called when a message blocked.
- `on_client_error`: Called when client cause exception.

# Example

```pycon
>>> @client.event
... async def on_chat(message: ChatMessage):
...     print(message.content)
```

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient._generate_access_token
documentation: API Method

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.send_chat
documentation:
Send a message.

Parameters
----------
message : str
    Message to Broadcasters

Raises
------
RuntimeError
    Occurs when the client can't connect to a broadcaster's chat
Chat Method

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.request_recent_chat
documentation:
Send a request recent chat to chzzk.
This method only makes a “request”.
If you want to get the recent chats of participants, use the `history` method.

Parameters
----------
count : Optional[int]
    Number of messages to fetch from the most recent, by default 50

Raises
------
RuntimeError
    Occurs when the client can't connect to a broadcaster's chat

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.history
documentation:
Get messages the user has previously sent.

Parameters
----------
count : Optional[int]
    Number of messages to fetch from the most recent, by default 50

Returns
-------
list[ChatMessage]
    Returns the user's most recently sent messages, in order of appearance

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.set_notice_message
documentation:
Set a pinned messsage.

Parameters
----------
message : ChatMessage
    A Chat to pin.

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.delete_notice_message
documentation: Delete a pinned message.

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.blind_message
documentation:
Blinds a chat.

Parameters
----------
message : ChatMessage
    A Chat to blind.

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.temporary_restrict
documentation:
Give temporary restrict to user.
A temporary restriction cannot be lifted arbitrarily.

Parameters
----------
user : ParticleUser | str
    A user object to give temporary restrict activity.
    Instead, it can be user id.

Returns
-------
ParticleUser
    Returns an user temporary restricted in chat.

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.live_status
documentation:
Get a live status info of broadcaster.

Parameters
----------
channel_id : Optional[str]
    The channel ID of broadcaster, default by channel id of ChatClient.

Returns
-------
Optional[LiveStatus]
    Return LiveStatus info. Sometimes the broadcaster is not broadcasting, returns None.

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.live_detail
documentation:
Get a live detail info of broadcaster.

Parameters
----------
channel_id : Optional[str]
    The channel ID of broadcaster, default by channel id of ChatClient.

Returns
-------
Optional[LiveDetail]
    Return LiveDetail info. Sometimes the broadcaster is not broadcasting, returns None.

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.manage
documentation:
Get a client provided broadcast management functionality.

Parameters
----------
channel_id : Optional[str]
    A channel id to manage broadcasts.
    The default value is the last channel id used.
    If initally use the manage method and don't have a channel_id argument,
    the default value is channel id of ChatClient.

Returns
-------
ManageClient
    Return a client provided broadcast management functionality.

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.manage_self
documentation: Get a client provided self-channel management functionally.

methods.name: chzzkpy.chat.chat_client.ChatClient.profile_card
documentation:
Get a profile card.

Parameters
----------
user : ParticleUser | str
    A user object to get profile card.
    Instead, it can be user id.

Returns
-------
Profile
    Returns a profile card with this channel information (include following info).

Represents a client to connect Chzzk (Naver Live Streaming).
Addition, this class includes chat feature.
